# CTOS Portfolio Roadmap
# 08 — Launch Layer (RMD v1.0)

## Objective

Prepare the portfolio for production deployment with enterprise-grade quality standards.

Launch is not deployment.

Launch means:

- Production Ready
- Performance Validated
- Accessibility Validated
- SEO Validated
- Conversion Validated
- Monitoring Enabled
- Rollback Ready

---

# Launch Philosophy

A portfolio is a product.

Every release must be:

- Stable
- Measurable
- Reversible

---

# Release Criteria

## Technical

- No critical bugs
- No broken routes
- No console errors
- No hydration errors

---

## Performance

- Lighthouse Performance >= 95
- Accessibility >= 100
- Best Practices >= 100
- SEO >= 100

---

## Experience

- Recruiter journey validated
- Founder journey validated
- Mobile journey validated

---

# Sprint L1 — Production Readiness Audit

## Verify

- Navigation
- Hero System
- Projects
- Case Studies
- Certificates
- Contact
- Search
- Command Palette

---

# Sprint L2 — UX Validation

## Recruiter Test

Can understand positioning within 15 seconds.

Can reach resume within 2 clicks.

Can reach contact within 3 clicks.

---

## Founder Test

Can identify value proposition quickly.

Can understand architecture thinking.

---

## Developer Test

Can access technical content easily.

---

# Sprint L3 — Accessibility Audit

## Requirements

Keyboard Navigation

Focus States

Contrast Compliance

Screen Reader Validation

Reduced Motion Validation

---

# Sprint L4 — SEO Audit

## Validate

Metadata

Open Graph

Twitter Cards

Canonical URLs

Structured Data

Sitemap

Robots.txt

---

# Sprint L5 — Motion Audit

## Review

Hero Motion

SVG Motion

Scroll Storytelling

Card Interactions

Visitor Globe

---

## Verify

60 FPS Target

Reduced Motion Support

No Jank

---

# Sprint L6 — Authority Audit

## Verify

Trust Signals

Case Studies

Flagship Project

Resume

Certificates

GitHub Links

---

# Sprint L7 — Browser Compatibility

## Desktop

Chrome

Firefox

Edge

Safari

---

## Mobile

Chrome Android

Safari iOS

Samsung Internet

---

# Sprint L8 — Device Testing Matrix

## Mobile

320px

375px

390px

414px

---

## Tablet

768px

820px

1024px

---

## Desktop

1280px

1440px

1920px

2560px

---

# Sprint L9 — Analytics Validation

## Track

Visitors

Countries

Resume Downloads

Case Study Views

Contact Clicks

GitHub Clicks

---

# Sprint L10 — Security Validation

## Verify Headers

CSP

HSTS

Permissions Policy

Referrer Policy

X-Frame-Options

---

# Sprint L11 — Deployment Runbook

## Build

npm run build

---

## Validate

Build Output

Asset Sizes

Broken Links

Search Index

---

## Deploy

Cloudflare

Production Environment

---

# Sprint L12 — Backup Strategy

## Required

GitHub Repository

Production Build

Environment Variables

Documentation

---

# Sprint L13 — Rollback Strategy

## Trigger Conditions

Broken Navigation

Critical UX Failure

Performance Regression

Production Errors

---

## Recovery

Revert Previous Stable Commit

Redeploy

Validate

---

# Sprint L14 — Post Launch Monitoring

## First 24 Hours

Errors

Traffic

Performance

Analytics

---

## First 7 Days

Conversion Review

Heatmap Review (Optional)

Performance Review

---

## First 30 Days

Content Review

SEO Review

Authority Review

---

# Launch KPIs

Positioning Understanding <15s

Project Discovery <60s

Resume Reachability <2 Clicks

Contact Reachability <3 Clicks

Lighthouse >=95

---

# AI Agent Launch Rules

Rule L-01

No launch with critical bugs.

Rule L-02

No launch below performance targets.

Rule L-03

Accessibility is mandatory.

Rule L-04

Every deployment must be reversible.

Rule L-05

Monitor before optimizing.

---

# Final Definition of Done

- Foundation Layer Complete
- Content Layer Complete
- Architecture Layer Complete
- Experience Layer Complete
- Motion Layer Complete
- Authority Layer Complete
- Optimization Layer Complete
- Launch Validation Complete
- Production Deployment Complete
- Monitoring Enabled

---

# Roadmap Complete

CTOS Portfolio System v1.0
